panels.title: Today's spend (USD)
panels.description: Sum of costMicrodollars for current UTC day, in dollars. Hard cap is $2/day at OpenRouter; soft cap is $1 enforced by runner pre-flight.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM("costMicrodollars"), 0) / 1000000.0 AS today_spend_usd FROM agent_runs WHERE "startedAt" >= date_trunc('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')

panels.title: Cost per skill — last 24h
panels.description: Sum of costMicrodollars per agent skill over the dashboard time window.

targets.rawSql: SELECT "skillName" AS skill, COALESCE(SUM("costMicrodollars"), 0) / 1000000.0 AS cost_usd FROM agent_runs WHERE $__timeFilter("startedAt") GROUP BY "skillName" ORDER BY cost_usd DESC

panels.title: P95 firing latency (ms) — last 24h
panels.description: P50 and P95 wall-clock duration per skill. Targets: support-triage ≤60s, customer-lifecycle ≤120s.

targets.rawSql: SELECT "startedAt" AS time, "skillName" AS metric, "durationMs" AS value FROM agent_runs WHERE $__timeFilter("startedAt") AND "durationMs" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY "startedAt"

panels.title: Outcome distribution — last 24h
panels.description: Mutual-exclusive outcome counts per skill. Healthy = mostly success/no_work. Alarming = any tool_error/api_error/timeout/budget_aborted/runner_crash sustained.

targets.rawSql: SELECT outcome AS metric, COUNT(*)::int AS value FROM agent_runs WHERE $__timeFilter("startedAt") GROUP BY outcome ORDER BY value DESC

panels.title: Cost per firing — last 24h (anomaly hunt)
panels.description: Each dot is one firing. Per-firing alert threshold $0.05 (50000 microdollars). Cluster threshold $0.20 sum per skill per hour.

targets.rawSql: SELECT "startedAt" AS time, "skillName" AS metric, "costMicrodollars" / 1000000.0 AS value FROM agent_runs WHERE $__timeFilter("startedAt") AND "costMicrodollars" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY "startedAt"
